column1:
Do you know that Jason's dog has had three beautiful_____________? 

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)

The Spice Girls was an all-girl band, so there weren't any____________. 

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)

It's a bit strange that Victor wears two_____________ - one on each arm.

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)

If_____________do the same jobs as their husbands, they should be paid the same. 

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)

The dentist says I have to have two_____________taken out! 

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)

Mrs Jenkins has just had a baby, so she's got three_______________now. 

(child/foot/man/person/puppy/tooth/watch/woman)
